title: tephroseris papposa subsp. microrrhiza
intro: Tephroseris papposa subsp. microrrhiza, also known as the dwarf tephroseris, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tephroseris papposa subsp. microrrhiza include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
